notes.en: [[character:gaming]] can reliably [[element:vaporize]] or [[element:melt]] most, if not all, of his [[talent:skill]]-enhanced Plunge Attacks. This allows him to deal high amounts of damage during his [[talent:burst]]'s Wushou state.
notes.fr: [[character:gaming]] peut déclencher [[element:vaporize]] ou [[element:melt]] de manière fiable sur la plupart, si ce n'est toutes, les attaques plongeants de son [[talent:skill]]. Cela lui permet d'infliger des dégâts importants pendant l'état Wushou de son [[talent:burst]].
